_comment: Manual Wikipedia URL overrides for the enrichment worklist. Add a row { url, note } keyed by book_id whenever the auto-matcher gets it wrong, then rerun build-wiki-enrichment-worklist.ts. Setting url to null marks a book as 'no Wikipedia article'.

788.note: de Sade 1791 novel; plain 'Justine' is a disambiguation page, matcher passed it on exact-title guard

581.note: main article, not the 'list of editions' redirect

219.note: Jesse Andrews novel; matcher already found this but flagged medium

1067.note: Jacob's Room To Choose by Sarah & Ian Hoffman — no dedicated Wikipedia article (2019, picture book)

3197.note: My Shadow is Pink by Scott Stuart — no dedicated Wikipedia article (2020, picture book)

624.note: no dedicated book article; author page is the canonical source

263.note: The Truth About Alice by Jennifer Mathieu — no dedicated Wikipedia article

27.note: main book article, not the play adaptation

74.note: Oscar Wilde novel, not the (play) adaptation

600.note: first novel of the trilogy, not the series page

268.note: Martin novel; matcher redirected to the (board game) page

755.note: Total Abuse by Peter Sotos — no dedicated Wikipedia article

861.note: A Banquet for Seaweed — no dedicated book article; author page documents the 2000 Al-Azhar fatwa/ban with specifics

870.note: correct article; matcher flagged medium only for missing author-intro match
